title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.328 - Marc Perez Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on Missouri Route N over the Meramec River in Franklin County
text:
227.328.  Marc Perez Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on Missouri Route N over the Meramec River in Franklin County. — The bridge on Missouri Route N over the Meramec River in Franklin County shall be designated as the "Marc Perez Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge with the costs of such designation to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2014 H.B. 1866)
